options.command: npx cap sync android && node -e "const exec = require('child_process').execSync; const fs = require('fs'); if (process.platform !== 'win32') { try { fs.chmodSync('android/gradlew', 0o755); } catch(e){} } const cmd = process.platform === 'win32' ? 'gradlew.bat assembleDebug' : './gradlew assembleDebug'; exec(cmd, { cwd: 'android', stdio: 'inherit' });"

npx cap sync ios && node -e "const exec = require('child_process').execSync; const cmd = process.platform === 'win32' ? 'echo iOS build skipped on Windows' : 'xcodebuild -workspace App.xcworkspace -scheme App -configuration Debug -destination generic/platform=iOS CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO -derivedDataPath build'; exec(cmd, { cwd: 'ios/App', stdio: 'inherit' });"
